prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年电子科技大学在山东省综合科类最低录取位次分别为约5283名→4863名→4377名→3917名→3794名，整体呈持续前移态势，近5年累计前移约1489名，202 5年基准位次约3794名；该校在山东省综合科类招生计划2021年145人、2022年141人、2023年144人、2024年145人、2025年144人，总体稳定在141–145人之间；2 026年综合科类计划132人，较2025年减少12人，同时新增医学科类17人（临床医学12人、护理学5人），两科类合计149人，实际总计划较2025年增加5人，但综合类单 独名额有所缩减。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 电子科技大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第33名，属于国内顶尖理工类高校，在电子信息领域具有 显著优势；2026年高考周期内学校声誉评价为偏负面，涉及2起学校管理与师德师风事件；抖音热度排名第33位（较热），短视频曝光量较高，反映考生关注度 不低；2022年曾出现断档黑马信号，但近年未见明显投档异常；信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、仪器科学与技术A-、光学工程A- 、管理科学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，核心优势集中在电子信息与计算机领域，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年热度为高热推荐 ，计算机类为推荐，均为社会高度认可的热门方向；山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），考生规模持续扩大，整体竞争加剧；电子科技大学位于四川省成都市，非山东省本地高校，无本省招生倾斜；该校在山东省招生人数占其全国 总招生比例约5.6%–6.3%（2021–2025年），属中等偏上水平，山东考生报考意愿稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3794名、综合类招生计划缩减12人使位次理论前移、 山东省考生总数增加5.7%加剧竞争、核心专业持续高热吸引更多高分考生报考，以及声誉偏负面带来的轻微抑制效应，预计2026年最低录取位次在基准基础上进一步前移，预测最 低位次约3574名，波动区间3074–4074名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the comprehensive subject category of the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in Shandong Province were approximately 5283 → 4863 → 4377 → 3917 → 3794, showing a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 1489 places over the past 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3794. The enrollment plan for the comprehensive subject category in Shandong Province was 145 in 2021, 141 in 2022, 144 in 2023, 145 in 2024, and 144 in 2025, remaining stable between 141 and 145. In 2026, the comprehensive subject category plan is 132, a decrease of 12 compared to 2025, while a new medical subject category of 17 (clinical medicine 12, nursing 5) is added, totaling 149 across both categories, an actual increase of 5 compared to 2025, but the comprehensive category alone has reduced slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 33rd, belonging to the top-tier science and engineering universities in China, with significant advantages in the field of electronic information. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the school's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving 2 incidents of school management and teacher ethics. Its Douyin popularity ranks 33rd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting considerable attention from examinees. In 2022, there was a dark horse signal of a cutoff, but no obvious admission anomalies have been seen in recent years. It has A+ in Information and Communication Engineering, A+ in Electronic Science and Technology, A in Computer Science and Technology, A- in Instrument Science and Technology, A- in Optical Engineering, and A- in Management Science and Engineering, totaling 6 disciplines at A- or above. The core advantages are concentrated in electronic information and computer fields, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic information/communication majors in 2024 have a popularity rating of high heat recommendation, and computer majors are recommended, both being highly recognized hot directions in society. The total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Shandong Province college entrance examination is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) compared to 2025, with the candidate scale continuing to expand and overall competition intensifying. The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, not a local university in Shandong Province, with no enrollment preference for this province. The number of students enrolled in Shandong Province accounts for about 5.6%–6.3% of its total national enrollment (2021–2025), which is at an upper-middle level, and the willingness of Shandong candidates to apply is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3794, the reduction of 12 in the comprehensive category enrollment plan theoretically shifts the ranking forward, the 5.7% increase in the total number of Shandong candidates intensifies competition, the sustained high popularity of core majors attracts more high-scoring candidates, and the slightly negative reputation has a mild inhibitory effect. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will further shift forward from the baseline, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 3574, and a fluctuation range of 3074–4074.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)

- Computer Science and Technology (Smart Finance and Blockchain Finance Dual A Joint Degree Experimental Class)
- Computer Class
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information (Information and Communication)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated System (National Demonstration Microelectronics College)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Engineering)
- Electronic Information (Optoelectronic Integration and Optical Networks)
- Software Engineering (Shahe Campus)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics, Electrical Information, Intelligent Manufacturing)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 3574, with a range of 3074–4074. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit of the range (3074) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (UESTC Talent Plan, Computer Dual Degree Experimental Class, etc.); candidates with rankings near the predicted value (about 3574) are advised to focus on Tier 2 core majors (Information and Communication, Integrated Circuits, Electronic Engineering, etc.), while also attempting Tier 1 sprinting; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (4074) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also trying Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China has electronic information and computers as its core characteristics, and it is recommended to prioritize majors directly related to A+.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 电子科技大学在山东省医学类单独招生批次中，2021年至2025年最低录取位次分别为27255、29003、29958、34999、34716，整体呈持续上升趋势（位次数字增大，竞争加剧）。 2021年医学类总计划10人（临床医学7人、护理学3人），2022年扩至14人（临床9人、护理5人），2023-2025年稳定在17人（临床12人、护理5人）。2026年医学类招生计划仍为17 人（临床医学12人、护理学5人），与2025年持平，无扩缩变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 电子科技大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选国家双一流建设高校，以电子信息科技为核心特色，工科实力突出。学校位于四川省成 都市，虽非传统医学强校，但其985平台和整体声誉对考生有较强吸引力，医学类专业依托学校工科优势发展交叉特色。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来在全国范围内报考热度持续上升，临床医学作为长线热门专业竞争尤为激烈。电子科技大学在山东省仅投放临床医学和护理学两个医学专业，招生规模较小（1 7人），稀缺性推高了竞争程度。2026年护理学继续以AI交叉创新人才培养实验班名义招生，增强了专业吸引力。学校地处成都，虽非山东考生首选地域，但985高校的品牌效应足 以弥补地域因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素，2026年电子科技大学在山东省医学类最低录取位次预计为35216名，较2025年的34716名略有上升（位次数字增大，竞争略加剧）。波动区间为34793至35639名。 主要依据：招生计划连续四年持平，但医学类报考热度持续走高，护理学AI交叉实验班品牌效应延续，且学校985层次对考生吸引力不减，预计位次在2025年基础上小幅回升。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间内，建议以护理学为主力志愿、临床医学作为冲刺志愿。临床医学录取位次远高于护理学，需结合自身位次合理定位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In the separate medical admission batch of the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in Shandong Province, the minimum admission rankings from 2021 to 2025 were 27255, 29003, 29958, 34999, and 34716 respectively, showing a continuous upward trend (increasing ranking numbers indicate intensified competition). In 2021, the total medical enrollment plan was 10 (7 for Clinical Medicine, 3 for Nursing), expanded to 14 in 2022 (9 for Clinical Medicine, 5 for Nursing), and stabilized at 17 from 2023 to 2025 (12 for Clinical Medicine, 5 for Nursing). The 2026 medical enrollment plan remains at 17 (12 for Clinical Medicine, 5 for Nursing), unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected as a national Double First-Class construction university. It is centered on electronic information technology as its core feature, with strong engineering capabilities. Located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, although not a traditional medical powerhouse, its 985 platform and overall reputation strongly attract candidates, and its medical programs leverage the university's engineering strengths to develop cross-disciplinary features.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs nationwide has been continuously rising, with Clinical Medicine being a long-term hot major with particularly intense competition. The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China only offers two medical programs in Shandong Province: Clinical Medicine and Nursing, with a small enrollment scale (17 people), and the scarcity drives up competition. In 2026, Nursing continues to enroll under the name of AI Cross-Innovation Talent Training Experimental Class, enhancing program appeal. Although the university is located in Chengdu, which is not the preferred region for Shandong candidates, the brand effect of a 985 university is sufficient to compensate for the location factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the above factors, the minimum admission ranking for the medical category of the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in Shandong Province in 2026 is expected to be 35216, slightly higher than the 34716 in 2025 (increasing ranking number indicates slightly intensified competition). The fluctuation range is between 34793 and 35639. Main basis: The enrollment plan has remained unchanged for four consecutive years, but the popularity of medical programs continues to rise, the brand effect of the Nursing AI cross-experimental class continues, and the university's 985 level remains attractive to candidates. It is expected that the ranking will slightly increase from the 2025 level.

(Only two admission programs, no medium-difficulty program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to use Nursing as the main volunteer and Clinical Medicine as a reach volunteer. The admission ranking for Clinical Medicine is much higher than that for Nursing, so you need to position yourself reasonably based on your own ranking.
